main.description: Create a simplespace-managed space anchored on the caller's own DID; the caller becomes the space authority. Requires auth with a covering manage=create grant, implemented by PDS.

spaceType.description: The space type NSID, which resolves to a space type declaration.

skey.description: The space key. When omitted, generated per the space type declaration's recommended key type.

config.description: Initial configuration. Defaults apply when omitted.

space.description: Permissioned space URI of the created space, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.
